channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: La Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 n’a jamais aussi été peu chère que pendant ces French Days
item.description: La Galaxy Watch 7 sous Android Wear arbore, comme à son habitude, des caractéristiques haut de gamme, un bel écran, un bracelet qui sort de l'ordinaire et la force d'Android Wear sauce One UI. On la trouve à 113 euros seulement chez E.Leclerc.

item.title: 'Bond often starts without a gun in the movies, and he can solve that creatively' — 007 First Light combat designer on the method behind its bombastic brawls
item.description: We speak to the senior combat designer behind Bond's fights in 007 First Light.

item.title: 'Now this is podracing!' — Star Wars: Galactic Racer will officially launch in October as developer shares preorder details
item.description: Fuse Games has announced the release date for Star Wars: Galactic Racer, alongside a new trailer and preorder details for a very pricey collector's edition.

item.title: Monter un PC gaming : nos recommandations des configurations PC gamer pour tous les budgets
item.description: Monter soi-même son PC de bureau gamer est la solution idéale pour avoir un équipement qui correspond parfaitement à ses besoins. Pour vous aider dans cette tâche, Frandroid vous accompagne pas à pas en vous conseillant les meilleurs composants pour la configuration PC gamer qu'il vous faut.

item.title: Anbernic’s new rotating screen handheld will start at less than $100
item.description: Following its sliding screen handheld that debuted last June with a design that some reviewers found to be too chunky and thick, Anbernic has shared more details about its new rotating screen handheld that looks more pocketable. The RG Rotate (Anbernic has never been known for its clever device naming) will be available for preorder […]

item.title: Des robots à l’aéroport pour porter vos valises : pourquoi le Japon est le premier à passer le cap
item.description: Un mètre trente-deux, trente-cinq kilos et deux heures d'autonomie. Le nouveau bagagiste de l'aéroport de Tokyo n'a besoin ni de pause ni de contrat de travail.

item.title: Light Phone Is Making Its Dumb Phone More Useful With Third-Party ‘Tools’
item.description: A new developer program for LightOS allows anyone to create tools for the Light Phone, whether that’s a local public transit app for your city or a way to read ebooks.

item.title: All these smart glasses and nothing to do
item.description: I'm currently wearing a pair of smart glasses called the Even Realities G2. Another two pairs, from Rokid, sit on my desk. A few feet away, I've got the Meta Ray-Ban Display charging alongside their Neural Wristband. In my closet are six pairs of $50 smart sunnies that an overzealous Walmart rep sent me. Those […]

item.title: 'A premium World Cup experience': these are the 3 OLED TVs I'd recommend if you're looking for the best way to watch the World Cup — I've tested and compared them all to the competition personally
item.description: If you want an upgrade to your World Cup watch party, an OLED is the perfect way to do it. Here are my 3 picks based on testing these TVs myself

item.title: I haven’t played a Bond game since Goldeneye on the N64 — but 007 First Light could finally change that
item.description: 007 First Light is shaping up to be an excellent James Bond game that could win over Bond sceptics like myself - but can it escape the shadow of Hitman?

item.title: Aluminium OS, One UI 9, Galaxy AI : Samsung préparerait un PC sans Windows
item.description: Samsung travaillerait sur une gamme entière de Galaxy Book tournant sous Android 17 et One UI 9, plutôt que Windows. Si l'info se confirme, c'est un signal fort envoyé à Microsoft, et un pari risqué sur la maturité d'Android pour le grand écran.

item.title: Torrenters, good news — Every NordVPN Mac server is now optimized for P2P connections
item.description: NordVPN's latest macOS update brings a major quality-of-life improvement, extending P2P support to all standard servers so you can torrent securely with just one click.

item.title: « Xiaomi est le premier à avoir cette technologie dans une voiture » : on a testé la Xiaomi YU7 électrique, le SUV électrique qui ringardise Tesla
item.description: Nous avons roulé à bord du Xiaomi YU7, le nouveau SUV électrique du constructeur taillé pour concurrencer le Tesla Model Y. Embarquez avec nous avec cette vidéo qui vous fera voyager dans cette voiture électrique en plein Pékin.

item.title: Panneaux solaires : la Chine pulvérise la barre historique des 28 % de rendement
item.description: Des records portés par les géants chinois s’enchaînent dans la filière solaire. Les cellules photovoltaïques sont de plus en plus performantes, promettant l’arrivée d’une nouvelle génération de modules à haut rendement sur le marché.

item.title: Sony 1000X The ColleXion : voici la fiche technique du casque très haut de gamme
item.description: Après avoir révélé son existence, le leaker billbil-kun dévoile ce que le casque Sony 1000X The ColleXion aurait dans le ventre.

item.title: RAM prices are up, but you can still get a decent gaming laptop for cheap — here are two budget picks from Lenovo and Asus
item.description: The RAM shortage continues to affect gaming laptop deals, but there are still a few bargains here and there.

item.title: C’est l’un des vélos électriques les plus réussis de 2026 : on a roulé avec l’Orbea Carpe
item.description: Plus qu’un vélo électrique design pour briller en ville, l’Orbea Carpe mise sur un lot de composants Shimano hautes performances, et des élémentsr maison, qui fait mouche lors de notre première prise en main.

item.title: How Adam Scott became an accidental horror movie star
item.description: Adam Scott grew up watching horror movies at, as he describes it, "probably too young" an age. But he never set out to work specifically in the genre. Even still, horror seemed to follow him around from the very beginning. His first major film role was in Hellraiser IV in 1996. "It wasn't because I […]

item.title: Voici les meilleurs PC portables et tablettes qui bradent leurs prix pour les French Days
item.description: Lors des French Days, il y a de belles affaires à saisir, tout particulièrement sur les appareils informatiques et multimédias, comme les PC portables et les tablettes. Découvrez notre sélection : il y en a pour tous les goûts et tous les budgets.

item.title: 'It’s very unusual for business to grow this fast': Even Amazon CEO Andy Jassy is surprised at AWS cloud success — and AI domination is next
item.description: AWS reports its best growth rate in 15 quarters, and at 28%, it's propping up total Amazon revenue by quite a margin.

item.title: Star Wars: Galactic Racer lands on PC, PS5 and Xbox Series X/S on October 6
item.description: A $160 physical collector's edition includes a rad-looking landspeeder model.

item.title: Les voix de l’IA Gemini devraient totalement changer
item.description: En examinant le code de l'application Google, des lignes font référence à un abandon des voix actuelles de l'IA Gemini.

item.title: Elon Musk veut faire tomber Sam Altman, mais c’est lui qui trébuche à la barre
item.description: Elon Musk voulait faire tomber Sam Altman. Il a passé deux jours à la barre d'un tribunal californien à expliquer pourquoi ses propres tweets ne devaient pas être pris au sérieux.

item.title: The Blood of Dawnwalker director says the game's time limit system won't 'punish' players — 'You’ll be able to complete a majority of the game before the time runs out'
item.description: Rebel Wolves CEO and The Blood of Dawnwalker director Konrad Tomaszkiewicz has said players don't need to worry about the game's time-limit mechanic and will have plenty of time to explore.

item.title: Currys launches its bank holiday sale with up to 40% on Ninja, LG, Shark, Dyson, and more — I've picked the 25 best deals
item.description: The Currys bank holiday sale is here, with savings of up to 40% available across thousands of tech items, so I've looked through and picked out the 25 best deals on TVs, laptops, appliances, vacuums, headphones, and more.

item.title: French Days : voici les meilleures offres Tech en DIRECT de ce jeudi 30 avril 2026
item.description: Les French Days continuent sur Boulanger, Fnac, Darty, Cdiscount et bien d'autres, ainsi que la French Week sur Amazon ! Comptez sur nous pour encore vous partager dans cet article, qui sera régulièrement mis à jour, les meilleures offres qui tombent sur les produits Tech populaires en 2026.

item.title: Le tout dernier MacBook Pro 14 M5 Pro profite des French Days pour alléger son prix de 250 €
item.description: Le MacBook Pro 14 M5 Pro est un laptop haut de gamme qui s'adresse surtout aux utilisateurs exigeants en quête de performances. Vous le retrouvez à 2 249 euros au lieu de 2499 euros sur Amazon pendant les French Days.

item.title: 5 myths about crypto payments for merchants and e-commerce
item.description: It’s a major technical headache for most people to buy a coffee using cryptocurrencies, let alone for businesses to pay suppliers.

item.title: Des gobelins et des gremlins envahissent ChatGPT : OpenAI désigne un coupable
item.description: Des utilisateurs de ChatGPT rapportent une prolifération de références à des gobelins et gremlins dans les réponses de l'IA. OpenAI désigne un coupable : le profil nerd.

item.title: How to win — and lose — Decoder
item.description: This interview has been lightly edited for length and clarity. Hello and welcome to Decoder, Nilay’s show about big ideas and other problems. This is Nick Statt, senior producer, and I’m joined by host and very occasional guest, Nilay Patel. Nilay, welcome back to your own show. Hello. I hate being the guest. Now, you […]

item.title: ChatGPT just made it easier to pick the right model, just like Gemini does — here’s when to use Instant, Thinking, or Pro
item.description: OpenAI has given the web interface a rejig for Plus, Pro and Business users, making it easier to choose between Instant and Thinking when you talk to ChatGPT.

item.title: Fnac et Darty se montrent bien généreux lors des French Days, voici les 12 meilleurs deals à saisir
item.description: Pour le lancement des French Days, les enseignes Fnac et Darty proposent une tonne de produits Tech à prix cassés. Toutes les offres ne sont pas bonnes à prendre, nous avons alors fait le tri pour vous afin de vous proposer les véritables dernières pépites de l’évènement.

item.title: The first Resident Evil movie trailer from Weapons director Zach Cregger is finally here — and it looks like the horror video game series is getting the adaptation it deserves
item.description: Resident Evil fans could be getting the adaptation of their dreams, as Zach Cregger's new movie looks very promising.

item.title: Samsung says the RAM shortage could get even worse next year
item.description: There may be a long wait before the end of the RAM shortage that's driving up prices on everything from phones to gaming handhelds. During an earnings call on Thursday, Samsung predicted that the severe memory shortage, driven by demand from AI data centers, will not only continue next year, but likely get worse, as […]

item.title: The Commodore 64 and ZX Spectrum have been turned into retrofuturistic handhelds
item.description: Blaze Entertainment, the company behind the cartridge-based Evercade consoles, has announced two new handhelds that reimagine iconic '80s personal computers as portable gaming machines. The Spectrum Handheld and The C64 Handheld eschew the productivity aspects of the Commodore 64 and ZX Spectrum to focus on gaming, with each portable coming with its own collection of […]...

item.title: OpenAI talks about not talking about goblins
item.description: OpenAI is opening up about its goblin problem. After a report from Wired revealed instructions to OpenAI's coding model to "never talk about goblins, gremlins, raccoons, trolls, ogres, pigeons, or other animals or creatures," the AI startup published an explanation on its website, calling references to the creatures a "strange habit" its models developed as […]...

item.title: Even Realities' G2 smart glasses will keep an eye on your AI agent
item.description: It's designed to keep you appraised of what your coding agent is doing, even when you're not at your desk.

item.title: This new study suggests Americans are being overcharged for insurance by $150 billion annually
item.description: In 2024, for every $1 collected in premiums, insurers reimbursed 62 cents for claims. A new analysis suggests Americans are being overcharged by $150 billion annually to insure their homes, autos and businesses — and it proposes federal guardrails so that a public beset by affordability pressures could see savings.The analysis by the Vanderbilt Policy Accelerator obtained exclusively by The Associated Press details how insurers are paying out less on claims after an accident, natural disaster or other misfortune than they did decades ago. For every $1 collected in premiums, insurers reimbursed...

item.title: The HyperX Clutch Talon is a super configurable multi-platform gaming controller
item.description: It features a bunch of hot-swappable components inside its bundled case and it's even Xbox-certified.

item.title: How solopreneurs should think about branding
item.description: When and how you invest depends on where your business is at the moment. If you’re self-employed and spend any time on social media, you’ve seen the debate. One person swears you need a professional website from day one. Another says a logo is the first thing to invest in. Someone else is selling a $500 course that promises to “elevate your brand’s presence.” ...

item.title: Le nouveau Xiaomi Redmi Note 15 Pro 5G perd déjà plus de 100 € de son prix grâce aux French Days
item.description: Noté 8/10, le Xiaomi Redmi Note 15 Pro 5G est un smartphone de milieu de gamme qui délivre de belles performances et des caractéristiques que l'on voit habituellement sur du haut de gamme. On le trouve en ce moment à 284 euros au lieu de 399 euros sur Amazon.

item.title: Comment obtenir son numéro RIO pour garder son numéro de téléphone ?
item.description: Pour garder son numéro de téléphone quand on change de forfait mobile, il faut obtenir son code de Relevé d’Identité Opérateur ou numéro RIO. Qu’est-ce que ce code RIO, comment fonctionne-t-il et, surtout, comment le trouver ? Suivez le guide !

item.title: Should phones be banned from concerts? Fred Again's tour has tapped into a global movement of people wanting to unplug at events that's grown 567%, according to new data — and I want to know where you stand
item.description: Did you mind Fred Again’s USB002 tour being smartphone free? Weigh in on the no phone debate.
